feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 【Question】SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition J60 Test Error CMD_API033・VMD_API058
entry.content:
【Question】SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition J60 Test Script
Error CMD_API033・VMD_API058 when configuring AR/AP Netting (Customer/Vendor Clearing)

Environment:
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- J60_JP Test Script (Accounts Payable)
- Test Item: 4.1.4 AR/AP Line Items Netting (Optional)

Issue:
I registered the same Business Partner (BP) as both a vendor and customer,
and attempted to configure netting by performing the following operations:

1. In Business Partner Update (BP) app:
- Vendor Role (Finance): Enabled "Clearing with Customer" flag
- Customer Role (Finance): Enabled "Clearing with Vendor" flag

2. Upon saving, the following errors occurred:
- CMD_API033: "Customer &1: No clearing account entered"
- VMD_API058: "Vendor &1: No clearing account entered"

Questions:
To properly configure this netting functionality, please advise:

1. In which App / SSCUI
2. In which Tab or Section
3. What values need to be set

for the AR/AP clearing (netting) process to work on this Business Partner?

(Additional reference: Guidance on setting the Control GL Account would also be appreciated)

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Download TAN Exemption Details
entry.content:
The suppliers' certificate details in the business partner master data will not be able to be downloaded in any standard report or excel?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The TDS is calculated in the Auto Bill Passing (MIRO) process
entry.content:
When we use the Auto Bill Passing Tile and create an Auto MIRO, the TDS is being calculated by the system, even though the threshold limit has not yet crossed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Has anyone recently converted from 2SL to 3SL system?
entry.content:
Hello

We are on S4HANA Public cloud since 2019 and are using the 2SL-SB system. I understand that SAP now offers conversion to 3SL for existing 2SL clients. I would like to know if anyone has gone through that recently. 

I am aware of the benefits of 3SL in general. But are there any specific functional/feature differences between 2SL vs 3SL? 

Thanks,

Deepti

entry.title: Email Processing & SOST Behavior in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I hope you are doing well.

I need your help regarding SOST (Tcode) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and how the email process is managed.

I am able to maintain email and PDF templates, and for some scenarios (such as Correspondence), I can preview the email. However, this is not the case for all outputs. For example, for payment advices, I can see the PDF generated in the Manage Automatic Payments app (via the “Display PDF” functionality), but I do not see how the email is handled.

I have already maintained my email in the Business Partner as well as in Output Determination, but no email is being sent. I also checked the email monitoring applications, but they only display a status indicator with very limited details.

Could you please guide me on how to properly test and troubleshoot custom email outputs in this context?
If you have any relevant documentation or resources on this topic, I would greatly appreciate it, as I have not been able to find clear information so far.

Thank you very much for your support!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, 3-system landscape, parallel line

entry.title: Analyze Closing Run Results for Balance Sheet Reclassification
entry.content:
Hello,

in SAP Public Cloud there is an app,  Analyze Closing Run Results (F3753), where you can analyze the results of the advanced Foreign currency valuation run.

So my question is, if an app exists with witch you can analyze the results of the advanced Balance Sheet reclassification runs?

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition: Automating WHT for intercompany AP/AR postings
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to ask for guidance on automating withholding tax determination for intercompany transactions in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

In my scenario, an intercompany sales document is created in the issuing company code, and the corresponding AP invoice is automatically posted in the receiving company code via IDoc. I am looking for a way to determine withholding tax automatically for these intercompany postings.

The requirement is that some intercompany transactions between the same entities are subject to withholding tax, while others are not. I am considering both:

  •             withholding tax at invoice, and
  •             withholding tax at payment.

I also need to understand the AR side of the process, because in the country version involved, assigning a withholding tax type to a condition type on the issuing side does not appear to be supported.

My questions are:

1. Is there any standard SAP approach in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition to automate WHT determination for intercompany AP postings triggered by IDoc?

2. Is there any supported design for handling the AR side when the country version does not support assigning WHT type to a condition type?

3. If standard configuration is not sufficient, is there any recommended extensibility or workaround in Public Edition to determine whether WHT should apply at invoice or payment time?

I am not looking for a manual workaround. The requirement is to keep the process automated at posting time.

Any guidance, examples, or references to SAP standard best practice would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to limit the users to use Joule Base
entry.content:
Dear SAP specialists,

One of my customers uses Joule Base in SAP Cloud ERP development environment for PoC and is now planning to enable it in production environment.

Before that, the leader of IT department has requested that Joule Base should be made available only to a limited group of users, at least during the initial production rollout.

Is it possible to restrict Joule Base usage to specific users only in SAP Cloud ERP?
As I understand, Joule Base (pop-up to input prompts) can be used by every user who can access the SAP Cloud ERP.
If it is possible, can you let me know the way?

Thanks and best regards,

entry.title: Custom CDS Error "Define one key field as a representative key field." persists despite setting it.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am facing a persistent error while creating a custom CDS view using the "Custom CDS Views" app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

[Context]

App: Custom CDS Views

Scenario: Analytical Dimension

[Issue Description]
The system keeps throwing the following error message:
"Define one key field as a representative key field."

However, I have already designated a field as the "Representative Key" under the View Properties / General tab. Despite maintaining this setting, the error does not go away and prevents me from publishing the view.

[What I have verified]

The field selected as the representative key is definitely marked/checked as a "Key" field in the element properties.

I tried removing it, saving the draft, and re-assigning it, but the error persists.

[My Question]
Why is the system not recognizing the representative key that I have already entered? What is the correct way or sequence of steps to make the system register it successfully and clear this error? Are there any hidden prerequisites (e.g., data type restrictions of the key field, or a specific combination with the primary data source keys) that I might be missing for the "Analytical Dimension" scenario?

(Note: I have attached a screenshot of my current screen configuration showing that it is maintained.)

Any insights, workarounds, or related SAP Notes would be highly appreciated.

Best Regards,

entry.title: What would you do if you need to replicate sales billing documents from S/4HC to external systems?
entry.content:
Hello.
Would you advise what you would do if you need to replicate sales billing documents from S/4HANA public cloud to external systems, such as data warehouse, analytics, etc.?
I have found an API Sales Order - Replicate (A2A) Sales Order - Replicate (A2A) | SAP Help Portal which replicates sales orders in bulk to external systems, but I wasn't able to find a similar API for sales billing documents.
If you know any workarounds to send sales billing documents in bulk from S/4HANA public cloud to external systems, then would you also advise?
Thank you and regards,
Yasuyo Goto

entry.title: the way i create a issue about supplier in running a predictive MRP job
entry.content:
would you tell me the way I create a issue that tells that a supplier doesn't have enough ability to deliver enough amount of materials we need?

I've created BOM, rounting, Purchase Info record, and work center, but still any supplier error doesn't occur.

do i miss some configuration or is there any issue on any master data?

entry.title: Requirement for Project-wise Customer and Supplier Line Item Report
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Our client is an EPC company and requires a report that segregates Manage Supplier Line Items and Manage Customer Line Items on a project-wise basis.

The client needs separate visibility of customer receivables and supplier payables for each project to effectively monitor:

  • Pending supplier payments
  • Outstanding customer dues
  • Project-wise cash flow status

We attempted to use a custom field for this requirement; however, the required data is not being captured in the report.

Since this is a critical reporting requirement for the client, kindly advise on the standard solution available or the feasibility of developing a custom report to meet this business requirement.

Your support and guidance on this matter would be highly appreciated.

Please guide me if there any other is available and tile to get the report.

Thanks & Regards,

Sivakumar

entry.title: Need to activate scope item 1S4 for daily exchange rates
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We did little reaserch and came to know that, to upload daily exchnage rates to sap automatically we need to activate scope item 1S4 for MRM. We request you to get back to us on urgent basis and confirm if this scope item really helps here.

If yes then let us know does it come up with separate cost or not.

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: quantity Colum issue shown only positive value
entry.content: We founded the issue in new report of new MB51 Material Documents Overview, quantity column, it is shown all Coolum quantity in positive, it does not provide exact status of supplier pending stock etc.  new report of new MB51 Material Documents Overview,  we need to require quantity column i.e., as old report MB51.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Label printing with templates stored on printer
entry.content:
Hey dear SAP-Community,

as a task I got to lookup how Label printing works in the cloud.
The customer wants to use a printer where label templates are stored directly on the printer.

I tried it with Integration Suite but there the problem is the printer being behind a firewall.
There I wanted to map/transform the received print data to ZPL format and then send it to the printer.

For me the only working solution I found regarding Public Cloud is creating an Adobe Forms Template and using Print Service + Print Manager to send file to printer.
The problem here is the creation of Adobe Forms Template as they don't want to do that.

Is there any way to use templates stored on printer in Public Cloud 2602 without creating Adobe Forms? - I mostly get to see "older" On-Prem posts.

Thanks and best regards
Luca

entry.title: Is there a way to control TECO using the Authorization Key along with the Phase Control BAdI?
entry.content:
We have configured an Authorization Key (ZBLOCK) assigned to Maintenance Planners and Maintenance Managers to allow TECO execution on maintenance orders, with the intention of restricting Supervisors.

While the Authorization Key supports manual phase control activation/deactivation, it does not allow mass updates via the Find Maintenance Order app, resulting in manual effort.

To address this, we implemented a Phase Control BAdI that automatically deactivates phase control after time confirmation. However, this approach unintentionally allows Supervisors to perform TECO, which we want to restrict.

A key limitation is that the Authorization Key is not available within the PCC BAdI, preventing role-based control in the enhancement logic. Additionally, no restriction field for order status (TECO) is available in Business Roles to control this at role level.

Requirement

  • Allow TECO execution only for Maintenance Planners and Managers

  • Restrict TECO for Supervisors, including in mass processing scenarios (e.g., Find Maintenance Order app)

  • Achieve this through either:

    • Mass deactivation of Phase Control for multiple maintenance orders in one step, or
    • Automatic Phase Control deactivation via BAdI, while still ensuring TECO is restricted at role or app level to only authorized users (Supervisors)

Could anyone advise, how to achieve this? We are using S4 Hana Public Cloud with 2 System Landscape.

entry.title: Need to activate scope item 1S4
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We need to activate scope item 1S4 for uploading daily exchange rates to SAP public cloud automatically. Please let us know if this is required additional cost or not?.

 

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: NFS-e Via – Fiscal Bookkeeping in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public (Brazil)
entry.content:
Olá,

Estamos buscando a abordagem correta para registrar e reportar a NFS-e Via -  Nota Fiscal de Serviço de Exploração de Vias  (Nota Fiscal Eletrônica de Serviço de Exploração de Vias) no SAP, onde o documento é emitido por um sistema externo e o SAP é utilizado apenas para fins de contabilidade fiscal e declaração de impostos.

Poderia confirmar se existe um tipo de documento fiscal padrão no SAP, um modelo de fatura ou um processo recomendado para o registro e a geração de relatórios desse tipo de documento?

Para contextualizar:

  • A NFS-e Via é utilizada exclusivamente por concessionárias de rodovias no Brasil.
  • Código do serviço: 220101 – Serviços de exploração rodoviária através da cobrança de portagens ou taxas de utilização.
  • Código NBS: 106042100
  • A fatura será emitida externamente; o SAP será utilizado apenas para registrar e reportar o documento fiscal para fins tributários.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Caso não exista um tipo de documento específico para NFS-e Via, qual seria a abordagem recomendada para registrar e gerar relatórios desse documento fiscal no SAP?

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud Issue While Performing Picking and PGI Using API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV in
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a challenge while using the API service API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV to create outbound deliveries, perform picking, and execute PGI activities from backend logic during material document creation.

When I test the same service using Postman with the configured communication arrangement, I am successfully able to create the delivery, perform picking, and complete PGI. However, while implementing the same logic in backend ABAP code, after successfully creating the delivery document, I am facing issues during the picking/PGI step.

Currently, I am getting the following error:

"The specified HTTP method is not allowed for the resource identified by the Data Service Request URI."

I also checked for any released business objects or RAP actions to perform picking and PGI activities, but I could not find any suitable standard business object/action for these processes.

Could you please suggest:

  • any workaround solutions,
  • standard/released business objects,
  • recommended implementation approaches,
  • relevant SAP documentation,
  • or any helpful blogs/references for this scenario?

Any guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Best compatible Warehouse scanners and label printers for S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

 

We are planning to use EWM and need information on the best compatible Warehouse scanners (RF guns) and label printers that are compatible with S4 HANA public cloud. Can you share the latest and still updated documentation for this? Can you please advise?
